{{Quote|Uh-oh! ESPOs!|Han Solo spots an SX20 and several other Security Police vehicles|<ref name="AotE">[[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 1|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''SX20 Patrol Airskimmer''' was a model of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle produced by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. The vehicle carried only a gunner and a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], with the pilot seated behind the gunner. Small, fast and maneuverable, the SX20 was used for a number of tasks by the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector's]] [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]], and one was amongst the Espo forces sent to stop a brawl involving [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Jahan Cross]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]].

==Description==
The SX20 Airskimmer was a model of small, fast,<ref name="HSCS" /> and [[Color/Legends|gray]]<ref name="AotE" /> [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle. Their design included a long body with a grill at one end and an [[Engine/Legends|engine]] at the other, as well as a pair of wires running down each side of the vehicle. The highly maneuverable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] patrol vehicle could travel normally at three-hundred and thirty [[Kilometer/Legends|Kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] up to ten [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] off the ground, with a maximum height of fifteen kilometers, though at reduced maneuverability. The vehicles were 4.7 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and could carry two crew, a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the back and a gunner in the front who controlled the airskimmer's [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]], which could be rotated to face any position except the rear of the ship. Each airskimmer cost 24,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and had a carrying capacity of twenty-five [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]].<ref name="HSCS" />

==History==
The SX20 was created by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and used by the [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. They were used for air traffic control and some light combat situations, although they also functioned well as an emergency reconnaissance or spy craft.<ref name="HSCS" /> In around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], a SX20 was amongst several Security Police vehicles which arrived to break up a brawl in [[Mondder Spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]], between [[Jahan Cross]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and a group of disgruntled [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] patrons.<ref name="AotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The SX20 was first mentioned in [[1993]] in ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'', a [[West End Games]] sourcebook written by [[Michael Allen Horne]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The vehicle then appeared briefly in [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 1|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 1]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] released in [[2011]], written by [[John Ostrander]] and illustrated by [[Stéphane Roux]].
